untranslatable_reason: Pattern-based conditions ('Prices rise steadily along a trend line', 'Price bumps up', 'Price rounds over', 'Price declines through the trend line', 'Price continues down through trend line') require pattern recognition logic beyond available indicators. These are morphological features that need candlestick pattern or trend line analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated the quantifiable exit conditions ('Look for overhead resistance before trading', 'Look for price weakness 5 to 6 weeks after breakout') into proxies: entry uses light volume breakdown (volume < historical average) suggesting bear pressure; exit at 42 days (6 weeks) or when price crosses back above trend proxy (sma_20). The core pattern detection (bump-and-run morphology) cannot be expressed with available indicators and requires set untranslatable=true.
